idea: Build PolicyProof, a compliance-evidence readiness tracker that connects fictional controls to reviewable evidence records and produces a local JSON audit snapshot.
audience: Internal compliance leads preparing an evidence-readiness review
outcome: Evidence gaps become obvious, review progress is measurable, and a reproducible local snapshot can be exported without external services.
constraints: Run locally with fictional deterministic data and no backend, auth, database, analytics, APIs, or network calls
Generate exports entirely in the browser
Be responsive and keyboard accessible with non-color-only status
Keep the demo under three minutes
must_have_capabilities: Trace every fictional control to zero or more evidence records
Filter controls by gap, pending, and reviewed state
Inspect a control and mark one evidence record reviewed
Download a deterministic JSON snapshot containing controls, evidence, status, and timestamp semantics
visual_direction: A trustworthy audit workspace with strong traceability, readable evidence detail, and restrained professional styling.
demo_preferences: Filter to gaps, inspect one control and its evidence, mark evidence reviewed, show coverage changing, download the local JSON snapshot, and reset.
